a260719p1.summary: While conducting espionage against powerful sheikh's tech company, Jonny Gannon helped Gulf country quash Washington suspicions about China ties
a260719p1.title: Sources: CIA operative Jonny Gannon spied on G42 to probe its China ties and helped the UAE gain expanded access to US AI chips by allaying US suspicions (Wall Street Journal)

a260719p10.summary: Despite steep and rising price tags, some companies heavily favor the more powerful ‘frontier’ AI systems over cheaper alternatives
a260719p10.title: As many companies cut AI costs by using cheaper models, some, like Shopify, go all-in on frontier models, barring engineers from using anything else (Belle Lin/Wall Street Journal)

a260719p11.summary: Kimi K3 has received far more love than we expected, and our GPUs are feeling it. Over the past 48 hours, demand has pushed close to the limits of our current capacity. To protect the experience of existing subscribers, we're temporarily pausing new subscriptions and
a260719p11.title: Moonshot AI pauses new subscriptions, saying that over the past two days Kimi K3 demand nearly passed the limit of its capacity, and also reworks its plan tiers (@kimi_moonshot)

a260719p12.summary: Earlier this week, we detected and responded to an intrusion into part of our production infrastructure.
a260719p12.title: Hugging Face says an agentic AI system hacked its data pipeline, accessing several internal clusters and credentials; its own AI-based triage caught the breach (Hugging Face)

a260719p13.summary: The unknown attacker “abused two code-execution paths in our dataset processing (a remote-code dataset loader and a template-injection …
a260719p13.title: Hugging Face says it used the open-weight GLM-5.2 hosted on its own compute for breach forensics, after US frontier model safety guardrails blocked the requests (Edward Targett/The Stack)

a260719p14.summary: A farmer in rural India takes a photo of a dying plant. She wants to research it on the internet but she doesn't speak English.
a260719p14.title: A look at the nonprofit Current AI, backed by $400M in commitments from many partners including $100M from France, that's funding open, public AI infrastructure (Kate Park/TechCrunch)

a260719p15.summary: How venture-capital firms are rewriting the rules in a once-in-a-lifetime IPO boom — Yasmin Razavi holds an unusual position …
a260719p15.title: As companies stay private longer, VC firms, like Spark, Gigafund, and Greenoaks, are investing in companies later on and buying stakes without seeking influence (Wall Street Journal)

a260719p16.summary: TSMC is racing to accelerate capacity at its Arizona factory as the company continues to see a “multi-year demand mega trend” …
a260719p16.title: TSMC CFO Wendell Huang says TSMC will use its new $100B US commitment, announced last week, to expand its Arizona capacity amid a "multi-year demand mega trend" (Jenny Lee/CNBC)

a260719p17.summary: France has blocked access to the Polymarket betting website, the country's gambling regulator said on Friday, citing concerns …
a260719p17.title: France's National Gambling Authority blocks access to Polymarket's website, citing concerns of exposing users to significant losses and manipulated trading (Sudip Kar-Gupta/Reuters)

a260719p18.summary: The institution is opening its doors to models from OpenAI, Meta, Anthropic and Mistral as it tries to bring lawmakers' growing use of the technology under control.
a260719p18.title: Sources: the EU Parliament plans to roll out EPGenAI Hub to MEPs and staff as early as Sept., letting them access Meta, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral models (Max Griera/Politico)

a260719p19.summary: Chey Tae-won expects memory demand to far exceed supply through 2027 despite capacity expansion — SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won …
a260719p19.title: SK Group Chair Chey Tae-won says the memory shortage has prompted governments to intervene for domestic industries, and SK Hynix must expand capacity faster (Moon Joon-hyun/The Korea Herald)

a260719p2.summary: Large corporate chains lose their edge as services such as DoorDash and Uber Eats level the playing field
a260719p2.title: Big US pizza delivery chains are struggling as apps such as DoorDash and Uber Eats give independent pizzerias and other restaurants greater market access (Haley Zimmerman/Financial Times)

a260719p3.summary: Sebastian Rucci's past has become a theme in opposition to his proposal. He counters: 'Do I look like a guy that's going away?'
a260719p3.title: A profile of businessman Sebastian Rucci, whose past ventures were subject to legal probes, as he bids to build California's biggest data center, a $10B project (Zusha Elinson/Wall Street Journal)

a260719p4.summary: San Francisco is still waiting for the AI IPOs — the wave of money from Anthropic and OpenAI millionaires and billionaires that is likely …
a260719p4.title: Analysis: OpenAI and Anthropic employees are donating to campaigns more heavily and cohesively than Google, Meta, and Airbnb employees did post-IPO (Alexandra Lindsay/The San Francisco ...)

a260719p5.summary: Moonshot AI has told investors it's preparing to list in as early as six months, seizing the opportunity to tap capital markets …
a260719p5.title: Sources: Kimi developer Moonshot told investors it is preparing for a Hong Kong IPO in as early as six months; its ARR hit $300M in June, up from $200M in April (Bloomberg)

a260719p6.summary: Here are the ways leading companies are already responding to the AI revolution in professional services
a260719p6.title: AI is reshaping entry-level professional services jobs, as companies redesign hiring, training, and workplace culture rather than simply cut junior roles (Andrew Hill/Financial Times)

a260719p7.summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. launched a preview version of its flagship Qwen3.8 Max model, which it described as comparable …
a260719p7.title: Alibaba launches a 2.4T parameter Qwen3.8 Max preview that it says rivals frontier AI models and is second only to Fable 5, plans to make it "open-weight soon" (Bloomberg)

a260719p8.summary: Also: The company tries out AI recording for Genius Bar appointments. — This week, we'll look at why Apple's massive lawsuit …
a260719p8.title: Thoughts on why Jony Ive, a close friend of Laurene Powell Jobs, isn't named in Apple's OpenAI suit; sources: Apple tests AI to record Genius Bar customer chats (Mark Gurman/Bloomberg)

a260719p9.summary: When Argentina and Spain take the field on Sunday for the World Cup final, more than $5.69 billion will be riding on the winner …
a260719p9.title: Kalshi and Polymarket bets on the FIFA World Cup final top $5.69B; Dune Analytics says total wagers on the platforms surpassed $50B for the first time in June (Lauren McCarthy/New York Times)
